title: L0 Agent Capability Types Registry
description: Bootstrap registry for agent capability discovery (Layer 0). IANA-style: designated expert review + PR process. Types MUST be verifiable — no self-declared unauditable capabilities.

attestation.description: Agent can produce signed attestations about other agents or events
attestation.verification: Ed25519 signature on attestation body, verifiable via public key in discovery record

delivery.description: Agent can deliver work products (code, documents, data) against a contract
delivery.verification: Content hash matches contract specification, delivery receipt in Merkle log

scoring.description: Agent can evaluate and score other agents' work or trust profiles
scoring.verification: Scoring methodology published, scores reproducible from input data

settlement.description: Agent can execute financial settlement (on-chain transfers, escrow)
settlement.verification: On-chain transaction signature, finality gate (see l35-trust-receipt.py)

discovery.description: Agent can serve capability discovery records for other agents
discovery.verification: Well-known endpoint returns valid L0 discovery record, DKIM-signed if via email

governance.pr_process: GitHub PR → expert review → 72h window → merge or block with reason

constraints.verifiable: All types MUST specify a verification method. Self-declared unauditable capabilities are rejected.
constraints.versioned: Types use semver. Breaking changes = major version bump.
constraints.backward_compatible: Minor version additions MUST NOT break existing consumers.
